Test Title: Verify page loads with navigation bar
Test Steps:
1. Open browser
2. Navigate to http://localhost:3000/chat
Expected Result: Navigation bar displays with NexusAI logo, 4 navigation links (Chat Hub active), Language selector, Sign In, Get Started buttons
Actual Result: Navbar rendered NexusAI logo, 4 navigation links, language selector, Sign In, and Get Started.

Test Title: Verify left sidebar displays model list
Test Steps:
1. Wait for page to load
2. Check left sidebar content
Expected Result: Left sidebar shows search input "Search 400+ models..." and scrollable list of AI models with icons, names, and lab badges
Actual Result: Left sidebar rendered the model search box and a scrollable list of model buttons.

Test Steps:
1. Type claude in model search
2. Verify filtered results
Expected Result: Only models containing "claude" in name or lab are displayed in the model list
Actual Result: Model search filtered the sidebar to 3 Claude/Anthropic entries.

Test Title: Verify model selection updates active model
Test Steps:
1. Click on a different model in the list
2. Check right sidebar updates
Test Data: Model: Any model different from current
Expected Result: Right sidebar updates to show selected model details, chat context changes to new model
Actual Result: Selecting GPT-5 Turbo updated the right sidebar and composer context.

Test Title: Verify guest session banner displays for non-logged users
Test Steps:
1. Access /chat without authentication
2. Check for guest session banner
Expected Result: Guest session banner appears showing "Guest session - X remaining" with "Save permanently ->" button linking to /auth/signup
Actual Result: Guest banner showed remaining time and linked Save permanently CTA.

Test Title: Verify welcome state displays when no messages
Preconditions: Fresh chat session with no messages
Test Steps:
1. Check chat area when no messages exist
2. Verify welcome content
Expected Result: Center area displays model icon, "Chat with [Model Name]" heading, and model description
Actual Result: Empty-state welcome content rendered the active model icon, title, and description.

Test Steps:
1. Type message Hello
2. Click Send button or press Enter
Expected Result: how are you?
Actual Result: Guest message sent, typing indicator appeared, and mocked assistant reply rendered.

Test Title: Verify Enter key sends message without Shift
Test Steps:
1. Type message
2. Press Enter (without Shift)
Expected Result: Message sends immediately without line break
Actual Result: Pressing Enter sent the message without inserting a line break.

Test Steps:
1. Type first line
2. Press Shift+Enter
3. Type second line
Expected Result: Cursor moves to new line without sending message
Actual Result: Shift+Enter inserted a newline and kept the composer unsent.

Test Steps:
1. Check if prompt suggestions panel appears
2. Verify tabs and suggestions
Expected Result: Panel displays with tabs (use_cases, etc.) and clickable prompt suggestions
Actual Result: Prompt suggestions panel rendered tabs and clickable prompts.

Test Title: Verify clicking prompt suggestion sends message
Test Steps:
1. Click on a prompt suggestion button
2. Verify message sends
Expected Result: Selected prompt appears in input and sends automatically
Actual Result: Clicking a prompt suggestion auto-sent it and rendered an assistant reply.

Test Steps:
1. Click microphone icon
2. Grant microphone permission
3. Speak text
Expected Result: Microphone icon shows recording state, spoken text appears in input field
Actual Result: Voice input populated transcript text and activated microphone styling (rgb(220, 38, 38)).

Test Title: Verify voice input stops on second click
Test Steps:
1. While recording
2. Verify recording stops
Expected Result: Recording stops, text remains in input field
Actual Result: Second microphone click stopped recognition and preserved the transcribed text.

Preconditions: At least one assistant message exists
Test Steps:
1. Click speaker icon
2. Verify audio plays
Expected Result: Last assistant message is read aloud using browser SpeechSynthesis API
Actual Result: Read aloud triggered SpeechSynthesis for the last assistant message.

Test Steps:
1. Click camera icon
2. Grant camera permission
3. Verify modal displays
Expected Result: Camera modal opens showing live video feed with Capture and Cancel buttons
Actual Result: Camera modal opened with Capture and Cancel actions.

Test Steps:
1. Click Capture button
2. Verify photo attaches
Expected Result: Photo captures, attaches to message as image attachment, camera modal closes
Actual Result: Camera capture attached an image chip and closed the modal.

Test Steps:
1. Click Cancel button
2. Verify modal closes
Expected Result: Camera modal closes without attaching photo
Actual Result: Camera modal closed without attaching a photo.

Test Steps:
1. Click voice recording button
2. Grant microphone permission
3. Speak for few seconds
Expected Result: Recording button shows red state with timer counting, audio records
Actual Result: Voice recording entered active state and started its timer.

Test Title: Verify voice recording attaches on stop
Test Steps:
1. Click voice recording button to stop
2. Verify audio attaches
Expected Result: Recording stops, audio file attaches to message with duration label
Actual Result: Stopping voice recording attached an audio chip with a duration label.

Test Steps:
1. Click video camera icon
2. Grant camera and microphone permissions
3. Verify modal displays
Expected Result: Video recorder modal opens with live feed and Start Recording/Cancel buttons
Actual Result: Video recorder modal opened with live recorder controls.

Test Steps:
1. Click Start Recording button
2. Verify recording state
Expected Result: Button changes to "Stop & Attach", red REC indicator with timer appears
Actual Result: Video recorder entered recording state and showed REC timer.

Test Title: Verify video recording attaches on stop
Test Steps:
1. Click Stop & Attach button
2. Verify video attaches
Expected Result: Recording stops, video file attaches to message with duration label
Actual Result: Stopping video recording attached a video chip with a duration label.

Test Steps:
1. Click paperclip icon
2. Verify file dialog opens
Expected Result: System file selection dialog opens
Actual Result: Attach file button opened the native file chooser.

Test Title: Verify file upload attaches multiple files
Test Steps:
1. Select multiple files
2. Verify attachments appear
Expected Result: Selected files display as attachment thumbnails below input
Actual Result: Multiple file selections rendered pending attachment chips.

Test Steps:
1. Click 'x' button on an attachment
2. Verify removal
Expected Result: Attachment removes from pending attachments list
Actual Result: Clicking the attachment x removed it from the pending list.

Test Steps:
1. Enter text and attach file
2. Click Send button
Expected Result: Message sends with both text and attachment visible in chat stream
Actual Result: Message sent with text and file attachment visible in the chat stream.

Test Title: Verify guest session persists across refresh
Test Steps:
1. Send message as guest
2. Refresh page
3. Check for messages
Expected Result: Previous messages and guest session state restore correctly
Actual Result: Guest chat history restored correctly after browser refresh.

Test Title: Verify guest session expires after 3 hours
Test Steps:
1. Create guest session
2. Wait 3 hours
3. Attempt to send message
Expected Result: System shows "Guest session expired (3 hours limit). Please sign up to continue chatting." message
Actual Result: Expired guest session blocked sending and surfaced the expiry message.
Notes: Backend validation inferred from observable guest-session expiry behavior; no direct backend or database inspection was available.

Test Title: Verify right sidebar model details display
Test Steps:
1. Check right sidebar content
2. Verify model information
Expected Result: Sidebar shows model icon, name, organization, tags, description, context, rating, price, reviews
Actual Result: Right sidebar showed model icon, metadata, description, and summary stats.

Test Steps:
1. Send multiple messages
2. Check usage chart
Expected Result: Usage overview chart shows activity bars updated with recent message timestamps
Actual Result: Usage overview updated after sending 5 messages in the same guest session.

Test Title: Verify quick action buttons send messages
Test Steps:
1. Click a quick action button
2. Verify message sends
Test Data: Quick action: Any from right sidebar
Expected Result: Clicked quick action text appears as sent message
Actual Result: Quick action button sent its prompt text into the conversation.

Test Steps: 1. Click Sign In button in navbar
Expected Result: Navigates to /auth/login page
Actual Result: Navbar Sign In button routed to /auth/login.

Test Steps: 1. Click Get Started button in navbar
Expected Result: Navigates to /auth/signup page
Actual Result: Navbar Get Started button routed to /auth/signup.

Test Steps:
1. Type only spaces in input
2. Click Send button
Expected Result: Send button remains disabled, no message sends

Test Title: Verify invalid model ID in URL query
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /chat?model=invalid-model-id
2. Check page behavior
Expected Result: System falls back to default model or first available model
Actual Result: Invalid model query gracefully fell back to a valid default model.

Test Title: Verify network error on message send
Test Steps:
1. Start message send
2. Simulate network failure
3. Check error handling
Expected Result: System displays "I could not reach the chat service. Please try again." message
Actual Result: Network failure rendered the fallback assistant error message.

Test Steps:
deny permission
2. Deny camera permission in browser dialog
Expected Result: System shows "Camera access denied." alert, camera modal does not open
Actual Result: Denied camera permission showed the Camera access denied alert.

Test Steps:
deny permission
2. Deny microphone permission in browser dialog
Expected Result: System shows "Voice input not supported in this browser." or permission denied alert
Actual Result: Denied microphone permission surfaced the microphone access denied alert.

Test Steps: 1. Try to use voice input in unsupported browser
Expected Result: System shows "Voice input not supported in this browser." alert
Actual Result: Unsupported browser voice input showed the expected fallback alert.

Test Steps: 1. Check message timestamps
Expected Result: Each message shows timestamp in HH:MM:SS format below message content
Actual Result: Message timestamps rendered successfully, including 10:13:59.

Test Steps:
waiting for response
2. Observe typing indicator
Expected Result: Three-dot typing indicator animates (dots pulse sequentially) while waiting for AI response
Actual Result: Three-dot typing indicator appeared while the delayed assistant response was pending.

Test Steps:
1. Send new message
2. Verify scroll position
Expected Result: Chat stream automatically scrolls to show newest message
Actual Result: Chat stream auto-scrolled to keep the latest message in view.

Test Steps:
1. Select model with badge
2. Check badge visibility
Test Data: Model: Any model with badge property
Expected Result: Badge appears on model in sidebar and in right sidebar details
Actual Result: Model badge rendered both in the sidebar list and active model detail panel.

Test Steps:
1. Click language dropdown
2. Select different language
Expected Result: Language selection updates, potentially changes text direction for RTL languages
Actual Result: Selecting Arabic updated the language selector and switched the page direction to RTL.

Test Steps:
1. Click sparkles/AI icon
2. Verify panel toggles
Expected Result: Panel opens/closes based on current state
Actual Result: Prompt suggestions panel toggled closed and reopened from the sparkles button.

Test Steps:
1. Click Cancel button
2. Verify modal closes
Expected Result: Video recorder modal closes without attaching video
Actual Result: Video recorder modal closed cleanly without attaching any video.

Test Steps:
1. Attach image file
2. Attach audio file
3. Attach document file
Expected Result: .mp3
Actual Result: Audio and document attachments were both rendered with the generic File label instead of distinct type labels.
Notes: Current upload implementation only distinguishes image files from all other file types.

Test Steps: 1. Check user message appearance
Expected Result: User message has accent background, white text, rounded corners with different radius pattern, right-aligned
Actual Result: User message bubble used accent styling, white text, and right-side alignment.

Test Steps: 1. Check assistant message appearance
Expected Result: Assistant message has white background, dark text, border, shadow, left-aligned with model icon
